bundles.title: Confirm Remaining Worktree Policies
bundles.goal: Lock the open behavioral questions so implementation bundles can ship a single worktree-mode contract without fallback paths.
outputs: confirmed implementation notes for cleanup retries, safety-only worktree prune behavior, and legacy read-only inspection semantics

tasks.title: Confirm the implementation policy for cleanup retries, safety-only git worktree prune, and legacy read-only inspection flows.
Translate the confirmed policies into acceptance notes for prepare-change, terminal cleanup, and read-only CLI behavior.
Record rejected alternatives so downstream bundles implement one behavior with no legacy-mode fallback.

bundles.title: Establish Main Worktree Foundation
bundles.goal: Replace branch checkout with a persisted main-session worktree contract and the run-state fields needed to drive it.
outputs: LocalRunState fields base_commit, base_branch, and cleanup_pending
worktree-aware workspace-context construction in the wiring layer
.specflow/worktrees/<CHANGE_ID>/main/ creation-reuse-fail-fast contract
prepare-change downstream execution rooted at the main-session worktree

tasks.title: Extend LocalRunState and persistence wiring with base_commit, base_branch, and cleanup_pending, then update the drift-guard test.
Add worktree override and base-info plumbing to the local WorkspaceContext construction path without leaking adapter concerns into core modules.
Replace ensureBranch with ensureMainSessionWorktree, including create, reuse, and fail-fast handling for .specflow/worktrees/<CHANGE_ID>/main/ and removal of legacy checkout mode.
Re-root prepare-change downstream openspec and specflow-run start calls to the resolved worktree path while preserving user-repo HEAD, branch, and dirty-state invariants.

bundles.title: Retarget Subagent Worktrees
bundles.goal: Move subagent execution and patch application onto change-scoped worktrees rooted under the main-session worktree parent.
outputs: .specflow/worktrees/<CHANGE_ID>/<RUN_ID>/<BUNDLE_ID>/ subagent layout
main-session worktree patch-apply target
subagent diff/base capture aligned to worktree mode

tasks.title: Thread mainSessionWorktreePath and change-scoped worktree parent data through apply-pipeline entrypoints from persisted run-state.
Re-parent subagent worktree creation to .specflow/worktrees/<CHANGE_ID>/<RUN_ID>/<BUNDLE_ID>/ using explicit user-repo absolute paths in the shared git worktree registry.
Switch subagent diff capture and patch application to compare within the subagent worktree and apply into the main-session worktree instead of the user repo.
Add targeted integration coverage for subagent worktree layout and patch landing location.

bundles.title: Route Phase Commands Through Worktree Paths
bundles.goal: Make phase-command wiring resolve and execute against state.worktree_path instead of assuming the user repo root.
outputs: shared run-id to worktree_path resolver in the wiring layer
worktree-rooted phase command execution contexts
grep or static guard against repo-root write-path assumptions

tasks.title: Audit src/bin and shared CLI wiring for write-path uses of process.cwd() or git rev-parse --show-toplevel.
Add a shared run-id to run-state to worktree_path resolver and use it to construct worktree-rooted execution contexts in the wiring layer.
Retarget shared phase command entrypoints and openspec invocations to state.worktree_path while leaving phase-specific approve and cleanup behavior to follow-on bundles.
Add a guard test that fails when new CLI write paths hard-code the user repo root outside the allowed wiring points.

bundles.title: Push And Create PR From Worktree
bundles.goal: Make approve push the change branch from the worktree and target PR creation at the recorded base branch with a safe fallback.
outputs: approve push from state.worktree_path
PR base resolution from base_branch upstream with default-branch fallback
gh pr create execution rooted at the worktree

tasks.title: Update approve to run git push -u origin <CHANGE_ID> from the recorded worktree path.
Resolve the PR base from base_branch upstream tracking data and fall back to the repository default branch when no upstream exists.
Run gh pr create from inside the worktree and surface clear failures when remote or base resolution fails.
Add approve-path coverage for feature-branch starts and detached-HEAD fallback behavior.

bundles.title: Gate And Cleanup Terminal Worktrees
bundles.goal: Remove the change-scoped worktree subtree only when terminal actions are complete and every worktree is clean, otherwise persist cleanup deferral state.
outputs: terminal cleanup gate across main and subagent worktrees
cleanup_pending lifecycle in run.json
deferred cleanup retry behavior for terminal re-entry

tasks.title: Implement the terminal cleanup gate for approve, archive, and reject by combining terminal success with per-worktree clean-tree checks.
Remove all worktrees under .specflow/worktrees/<CHANGE_ID>/ with non-force git worktree remove and delete the parent directory when the gate says remove.
Persist cleanup_pending = true, surface offending paths or partial-failure causes, and keep the run terminal when cleanup must defer.
Re-evaluate deferred cleanup on subsequent terminal-phase invocations and clear the pending flag when cleanup eventually succeeds.

bundles.title: Block Legacy Resume Paths
bundles.goal: Reject persisted legacy runs on prepare-change resume when worktree_path still points at the user repo root, without breaking read-only inspection flows.
outputs: prepare-change legacy run-state guard
non-mutating blocked-resume behavior
explicit remediation messaging for legacy runs

tasks.title: Detect resumed runs in prepare-change where worktree_path equals repo_path and fail before any workspace mutation occurs.
Restrict the guard to prepare-change resume paths so read-only inspection commands can still load legacy records.
Emit actionable remediation guidance with the conflicting paths in the error output.
Add blocked-resume coverage proving the legacy guard is non-mutating.

bundles.title: Retarget Watcher And Dashboard Reads
bundles.goal: Make watcher, dashboard, archive, and related status surfaces follow worktree_path indirection instead of scanning the user repo.
outputs: watcher artifact reads routed through worktree_path
dashboard and archive readers pointed at worktree-local openspec artifacts
run-id based status surfaces free of repo-root path assumptions

tasks.title: Update specflow-watch to resolve the active worktree_path from RUN_ID and follow artifacts in the worktree.
Retarget dashboard, archive, and related readers to inspect openspec/changes/<CHANGE_ID>/ inside the worktree until archive propagation completes.
Audit external hook or status surfaces that accept RUN_ID so they use run-state indirection rather than repo-root scanning.
Add coverage for watcher and dashboard behavior against active worktree-mode runs.

bundles.title: Verify Worktree Invariants End To End
bundles.goal: Prove the new worktree mode preserves user-repo invariants and satisfies completion conditions C-1 through C-7 across the full lifecycle.
inputs: temp git repo fixture and integration test harness
outputs: integration suite covering completion conditions C-1 through C-7
temp-repo smoke tests for user-repo invariants
regression guards for forbidden repo-root write paths and legacy resume behavior

tasks.title: Build temp-repo end-to-end smoke tests covering fresh prepare-change through apply, approve, and reject with assertions that the user repo HEAD, branch, and dirty state never change.
Add integration tests for subagent patch application, watcher/dashboard worktree resolution, and terminal cleanup defer-versus-remove flows.
Verify approve PR base selection against recorded base_branch, including default-branch fallback when upstream tracking is missing.
Lock in grep and runtime guards for forbidden repo-root write paths and legacy resume rejection across the CLI surface.
